$comment: Product specification — deep product knowledge. Factual context.

_changelog.1.8: Batch 5 stress test (9 anonymized DTC pilots — skincare subscription, outdoor apparel, porridge, supplements, chicory beverage, clean beauty, haircare, sport nutrition, natural cosmetics) gap closure. ADDED: specs.posology{} (recommended daily dose, timing, duration) for EU/EFSA supplement compliance. specs.contraindications{} (conditions, medications, age, pregnancy, breastfeeding) for regulated products. specs.origin{} (country/region/facility/local_supply/made_in_claim) replacing free-text origin claims. specs.production_method{} (industrial|small_batch|artisanal|limited_batch|handmade|made_to_order). specs.preparation{} (cooking_required, method, time_minutes, serving_suggestions) for food requiring prep. specs.external_databases{} (open_food_facts, yuka, inci_beauty, ean, gtin). specs.target_suitability{} universal container (skin/hair/body/use_case/demographics) — unifies haircare, skincare, apparel, supplements. specs.durability{} (warranty, repair, lifespan, repairability_index) for outdoor apparel/electronics. EXTENDED: specs.composition[] accepts structured {ingredient, pct, organic, class, origin, inci}. specs.nutrition_facts.allergens += 'oats'. specs.nutrition_facts.allergen_sources[] for derived allergens. specs.nutrition_facts.nutri_score_grade (A-E). specs.nutrition_facts.dietary_tags += clean_beauty, cruelty_free, chicory_based, caffeine_free, bio, raw. specs.perishability.period_after_opening_months (EU Cosmetics PAO) + expiry_date_required. All additions optional, full backward compat.
_changelog.1.7: Batch 4 stress test (5 anonymized DTC pilots — skincare refillable, eco-cleaning, apparel community-voted, tea subscription, meal replacement) gap closure. ADDED: specs.nutrition_facts{} for ingestible products (meal replacements, supplements, food). identity.co_creation{} block for community-voted or crowdsourced products. All additions optional, full backward compat with v1.5/v1.6.
_changelog.1.5: S26e: identity.product_condition (new|refurbished|certified_refurbished|open_box). identity.licensing{} for licensed IP (ip_holder, territories, royalty). specs.perishability{} for products with shelf life (flowers, food, cosmetics). pricing.pricing_model (fixed|dynamic|quote) + pricing.price_range{} + pricing.price_factors[] for configurable/variable pricing. All new fields optional — full backward compat with v1.4.
_changelog.1.4: S26d: identity.product_category discriminator (physical|physical_electronic|digital|service). identity.anti_features[] for intentional absence as USP. identity.customizable{} for user-created products. gift_economy{} block for buyer≠consumer chains. specs.device_features[] formalized (was electronic-device pilot hack). specs.digital_specs{} for content-as-product. specs.service_specs{} for service products. All new fields optional — full backward compat with v1.3.
_changelog.1.3: S26c: identity.type discriminator (functional|sensory|lifestyle). identity.product_name for brand-voice display names. sensory_profile block for fragrance/sensory products. sustainability block for eco-claims, packaging, refill relationships. All new blocks optional — backward compatible.
_changelog.1.2: S26b: identity.external_ids added (shopify_handle, meta_product_id, gmc_id). Maps workspace slug to platform-specific identifiers for automated agent fetch.
_changelog.1.1: S26 red-team patch: verbatim_quotes converted from string[] to object[] with {text, platform, rating, sentiment}. Breaking change — existing string entries must be migrated.

external_ids._notes: Platform-specific identifiers. Allows agents to fetch product data from each platform automatically. Add keys as needed (amazon_asin, tiktok_product_id, etc.).

_notes.type: functional = active-principle driven (supplements, skincare). sensory = emotion/experience driven (fragrance, candles). lifestyle = identity/values driven (fashion, accessories). Determines which optional blocks are relevant.
_notes.product_category: physical = consumable/wearable goods. physical_electronic = hardware devices (Morphée, IoT, tech). digital = content-as-product (e-books, audio packs, coaching sessions). service = repair, subscription service, consultation. Determines which specs blocks are relevant: physical→composition, physical_electronic→device_features, digital→digital_specs, service→service_specs.
_notes.product_name: Brand-voice display name when slug is functional/SEO. E.g. slug='shampoing-solide-cheveux-ternes' but product_name='Tout Nu'. Null if slug suffices.
_notes.anti_features: Optional. What this product intentionally does NOT do, when that absence IS the selling point. E.g. ['no_screen', 'no_wifi', 'no_app', 'no_subscription', 'no_tracking']. Empty array if not applicable.
_notes.customizable: Optional. Null if product is standard. Object: {enabled: true, type: 'text'|'design'|'config'|'assembly', user_input_description: 'What the customer creates/customizes'}. text=customer writes message (Shanty Biscuits). design=customer designs visual (print-on-demand). config=customer picks options (build-your-own). assembly=customer assembles components (modular).
_notes.co_creation: Optional. Null if product is NOT co-created with a community. Object: {enabled: true, mechanism: 'vote'|'survey'|'iterative_feedback'|'crowdfunding', community_size: number|null, input_collected: string[] (what the community decides: 'fabric', 'color', 'fit', 'feature_priority'), iteration_cycle: string ('per_drop'|'quarterly'|'per_product')}. Distinct from customizable (individual buyer customization) — co_creation is collective design BEFORE the product exists. Ex: Asphalte (community votes on fabric/fit before production run). Impacts messaging (belonging, exclusivity, insider status) and pre-order fulfillment logic.
_notes.product_condition: new | refurbished | certified_refurbished | open_box. Default: 'new'. For circular economy products (Back Market, Apple Refurbished). Impacts pricing expectations, warranty terms, sustainability narrative.
_notes.licensing: Optional. Null if no third-party IP. Object: {ip_holder: 'Warner Bros' | 'Disney' | etc, territories: ['FR', 'EU'] | ['worldwide'], royalty_pct: number|null, renewal_date: 'YYYY-MM-DD'|null, restrictions: string|null}. For products built on licensed IP (Harry Potter audio, Disney collabs, brand partnerships). Affects margin, availability, and marketing constraints.

_notes._block: Fill what's relevant based on identity.product_category. physical→materials+composition. physical_electronic→materials+device_features. digital→digital_specs. service→service_specs. variants/weight/volume apply to physical* only.
_notes.composition: v1.8+: accepts string[] (legacy) OR array of objects {ingredient, pct, organic_certified, class, origin, inci}. class enum: active|filler|preservative|fragrance|colorant|emulsifier|binder|other. Mix allowed.
_notes.posology: v1.8+. Optional. For supplements, ingestibles, skincare with prescribed usage. Object: {recommended_daily_servings, serving_unit ('gelule'|'capsule'|'scoop'|'ml'|'g'|'sachet'|'application'|'wash'), timing ('morning'|'with meals'|etc), duration_recommended ('3-month cure'|'continuous'), max_daily_dose, notes}. Driver for EU/EFSA claims and cure-based marketing. Null if not applicable.
_notes.contraindications: v1.8+. Optional. For regulated products (supplements, drugs, actives). Object: {conditions[], medications[], age_min, age_max, pregnancy: 'safe'|'avoid'|'consult_doctor'|'contraindicated', breastfeeding: idem, warnings[]}. Powers safety disclosures, chatbot guardrails, ad-copy review.
_notes.origin: v1.8+. Optional. Replaces free-text 'Made in France'. Object: {country (ISO-3166), region, facility, local_supply_pct, made_in_claim ('Origine France Garantie'|etc), supply_chain_transparency: 'full'|'partial'|'opaque'}. Powers Made-In filters and storytelling.
_notes.production_method: v1.8+. Optional. Object: {type: 'industrial'|'small_batch'|'artisanal'|'limited_batch'|'handmade'|'made_to_order', batch_size, frequency ('seasonal'|'weekly'|'on_demand'), method_notes}. Null for standard mass production.
_notes.preparation: v1.8+. Optional. For food/beverage requiring prep. Object: {cooking_required, method ('infuse'|'blend'|'boil'|'microwave'|'add_water'), time_minutes, temperature, serving_suggestions[]}. Null if ready-to-consume.
_notes.external_databases: v1.8+. Optional. Object: {open_food_facts_id, yuka_id, inci_beauty_id, ciqual_id, ean, gtin}. Enables automated third-party rating fetch. additionalProperties allowed for future DBs.
_notes.target_suitability: v1.8+. Optional. UNIVERSAL 'who is this for' container. Object: {skin_types[] (dry|oily|combination|sensitive|normal|mature|acne_prone|rosacea|eczema), hair_types[] (straight|wavy|curly|coily|fine|thick|dry|oily|damaged|colored|frizzy|thinning), body_areas[] (free: 'face'|'scalp'|'full_body'|'outdoor_trail'), use_cases[] (free: 'trail_running'|'daily_commute'), demographics[] (free: 'women_menopause'|'teens')}. Works for ALL categories: cosmetics, apparel, supplements. Null if untargeted.
_notes.durability: v1.8+. Optional. For durable goods (apparel, electronics, furniture). Object: {warranty_years, warranty_type: 'limited'|'lifetime'|'conditional'|'commercial', repairable, spare_parts_available, repair_program, lifespan_estimate, repairability_index (FR 2021+ electronics 0-10)}. Null for consumables.
_notes.perishability: Optional. Null if product has no meaningful shelf life. Object: {shelf_life_days: {min, max}, peak_freshness_days: {start, end}, storage_conditions: string, freshness_guarantee: string|null}. For flowers (5-7 days), fresh food, short-DLC cosmetics, meal kits. shelf_life_days = total usable life from delivery. peak_freshness_days = window of optimal quality (day 1-3 for flowers). freshness_guarantee = brand promise ('replace if wilted on arrival'). Impacts COGS modeling, inventory hold, refund logic.
_notes.nutrition_facts: Optional. For ingestible products (food, beverages, meal replacements, supplements). Object: {serving_size, calories, macros, micros[], allergens[] (EU14 + oats, v1.8), allergen_sources[] (derived: 'lanolin'|'gelatin'|'bee'|'latex', v1.8), dietary_tags[] (+clean_beauty|cruelty_free|chicory_based|caffeine_free|bio|raw, v1.8), nutri_score_grade (A-E, v1.8)}. Null if not ingestible.
_notes.device_features: Array of {feature, description, implementation}. For product_category=physical_electronic. Each entry = one capability of the device. Replaces composition[] for hardware products.
_notes.digital_specs: For product_category=digital. Object: {format: 'audio'|'video'|'pdf'|'app'|'course', delivery_method: 'download'|'streaming'|'usb_transfer'|'in_app', access_duration: 'permanent'|'1_year'|'subscription'|string, file_size: string|null, drm: true|false, platform_requirements: string|null}. Null if not digital.
_notes.service_specs: For product_category=service. Object: {service_type: 'repair'|'consultation'|'coaching'|'installation'|'subscription_service', duration: string|null, coverage: string (what's included), conditions: string (eligibility/restrictions), delivery_method: 'in_person'|'remote'|'mail_in'|'on_site'}. Null if not service.

active_principle._notes: Raw R&D facts. What the founder/R&D explains. Storytelling is output, not source.

unique_mechanism._notes: Branded solution name if exists (e.g. 'DermaPure'). Null if none — pipeline can propose.

_verbatim_quote_example.text: Exact customer language. Copy gold — used as-is in ads and emails.
_verbatim_quote_example.platform: trustpilot | amazon | reddit | support | survey | judge_me | shopify_reviews | google_reviews | instagram_dm | tiktok | youtube | facebook
_verbatim_quote_example.rating: Star rating of the review this quote comes from. Null if N/A.
_verbatim_quote_example.sentiment: positive | negative | neutral. Prevents using a complaint as a testimonial.

_notes.verbatim_quotes: Max 10 representative quotes per problem. Each carries source context for safe downstream use.
_notes.urgency: 1-10. How urgently they want it solved.

_notes._block: Optional. Used when identity.type = 'sensory'. For fragrance, candles, aromatherapy. Null/empty if not applicable.
_notes.scent_family: floral | oriental | woody | fresh | chypre | fougere | gourmand | aquatic
_notes.longevity: Expected wear time. E.g. '6-8 hours'. Use qualifiers ('up to', 'typically').

_notes._block: Optional. For brands where sustainability is part of the value proposition. Null/empty if not a differentiator.
_notes.packaging_type: plastic | glass | aluminum | cardboard | naked (no packaging) | refillable
_notes.eco_claims: Raw claims from brand. E.g. ['zero plastic', 'biodegradable formula', 'vegan']. Must be backed by certifications.
_notes.refill.refill_slug: Slug of the refill product in products_index. Creates parent-child link.
_notes.environmental_impact: Quantified metrics when available. Null if not measured.

_notes._block: Optional. For products where buyer ≠ consumer (gifts, personalized items, subscriptions-as-gifts). When buyer_is_consumer=true (default), standard benefits[] apply to both. When false, benefits are split: buyer feels one chain (gifting emotions), recipient feels another (product experience). This enables dual-perspective ad copy and landing pages.
_notes.buyer_benefits_chain: Array of {level: 'functional'|'emotional'|'identity', formulation: string}. The emotions/identity of the person BUYING (generosity, thoughtfulness, 'I found the perfect gift').
_notes.recipient_benefits_chain: Array of {level: 'functional'|'emotional'|'identity', formulation: string}. The experience of the person RECEIVING (surprise, delight, product utility).

_notes.pricing_model: fixed = single price per SKU (default, most products). dynamic = price varies by configuration (furniture configurators, made-to-order). quote = price on request (B2B, custom projects). When dynamic: use price_range instead of price, and document price_factors.
_notes.price_range: For pricing_model=dynamic|quote. Object: {min: number, max: number, typical: number|null}. min/max = observed or configured extremes. typical = most common order value. Null if pricing_model=fixed.
_notes.price_factors: For pricing_model=dynamic. Array of {factor: string, impact: string}. Each entry = one variable that changes the final price. factor = what varies ('material', 'dimensions', 'finish'). impact = how much ('€50-€150 surcharge', '+20% for oak vs MDF'). Empty array if pricing_model=fixed.
_notes.cogs: Cost of goods sold per unit, same currency as price.
_notes.breakeven_cpa: Max CPA to stay profitable. Computed: price × gross_margin.
